subject: Fix refrepo image building
commit_message:
Fix refrepo image building

Issue-ID: VNFSDK-569
Signed-off-by: Zebek Bogumil <bogumil.zebek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ib59b2cfeff0f1a8150dfb32473f0080f962a0a3d

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vnfsdk-refrepo-master-verify-java/569/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vnfsdk-refrepo-master-verify-java/569

Patch Set 1:

Hi Bogumil, Tahnk you for fixing this.
is this gerrit change https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/104828 fix this issue?
and pls let me know if we shall hold this patch, till we get the docker image for F release?
Thanks

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Hi Bogumil, Tahnk you for fixing this.
> is this gerrit change https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/104828 fix this issue?
> and pls let me know if we shall hold this patch, till we get the docker image for F release?
> Thanks
I don't think that mentioned Gerrit change will fix existing problem.
Currently we have a problem with project configuration. Without my correction image will not be created.

I hope that my correction will fix problem at Jenkins, but also we need to change JJB. We need to change Jenkins JJB to invoke docker profile at root pom.xml.

Without this change docker-stage JJB will not work. So image will not be pushed to nexus3 and we cannot release official image.

This correction should not break anything, because I've added only profile.

> 
> I hope that my correction will fix problem at Jenkins, but also we need to change JJB. We need to change Jenkins JJB to invoke docker profile at root pom.xml.
> 
> Without this change docker-stage JJB will not work. So image will not be pushed to nexus3 and we cannot release official image.
> 
> This correction should not break anything, because I've added only profile.

Hi Bogumil, OK. I push this change. and in CI, i have made things very simple now. (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/104828/2/jjb/vnfsdk/vnfsdk-refrepo.yaml) Hope with your fix, now image should get pushed into staging with all 3 tags. Thanks.
Change has been successfully merged by Kanagaraj Manickam
